parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.id AS publicacao_id,
  p.clip_id,
  p.plataforma,
  p.id_publicacao_plataforma,
  p.url_publicacao,
  p.data_publicacao,
  cg.titulo_final,
  cg.engine_usada,
  cg.video_origem_id,
  cg.nicho,
  cg.canal_id,
  cg.duracao_clip AS duracao_segundos
FROM publicacoes p
JOIN clips_gerados cg ON cg.id = p.clip_id
WHERE p.status = 'publicado'
  AND p.data_publicacao >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND p.plataforma = 'youtube'
  AND p.id_publicacao_plataforma IS NOT NULL
  AND p.id_publicacao_plataforma NOT LIKE 'vizard-%'
  AND p.id_publicacao_plataforma != 'pending'
ORDER BY p.data_publicacao DESC
LIMIT 50;

parameters.jsCode:
const pub = $json;
return [{ json: { ...pub, youtube_video_id: pub.id_publicacao_plataforma } }];

// HTTP error: salva zeros para não perder o registro
const pubData = $('loop-by-publication').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  publicacao_id:    pubData.publicacao_id,
  plataforma:       pubData.plataforma,
  views:            0,
  likes:            0,
  comentarios:      0,
  compartilhamentos: 0,
  titulo_final:     pubData.titulo_final,
  engine_usada:     pubData.engine_usada,
  nicho:            pubData.nicho,
  duracao_segundos: pubData.duracao_segundos,
  canal_id:         pubData.canal_id,
  engagement_rate:  '0.00',
  has_stats:        false,
  api_error:        true
} }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO metricas_publicacao (
  publicacao_id, plataforma, views, likes,
  comentarios, compartilhamentos, data_coleta
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.publicacao_id }}',
  '{{ $json.plataforma }}',
  {{ $json.views }},
  {{ $json.likes }},
  {{ $json.comentarios }},
  {{ $json.compartilhamentos }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (publicacao_id, data_coleta::date)
DO UPDATE SET
  views             = GREATEST(metricas_publicacao.views, EXCLUDED.views),
  likes             = GREATEST(metricas_publicacao.likes, EXCLUDED.likes),
  comentarios       = GREATEST(metricas_publicacao.comentarios, EXCLUDED.comentarios),
  compartilhamentos = GREATEST(metricas_publicacao.compartilhamentos, EXCLUDED.compartilhamentos);

SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT mp.publicacao_id) AS total_tracked,
  COALESCE(SUM(mp.views), 0)       AS total_views,
  COALESCE(SUM(mp.likes), 0)       AS total_likes,
  COALESCE(SUM(mp.comentarios), 0) AS total_comments,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN mp.views > 0 THEN ((mp.likes + mp.comentarios)::numeric / mp.views) * 100 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS avg_engagement
FROM metricas_publicacao mp
WHERE mp.data_coleta >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day';

parameters.jsCode:
const today = new Date();
return [{ json: { ...$json, is_weekly: today.getDay() === 1, current_day: today.getDay() } }];

parameters.query:
WITH latest_metrics AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (mp.publicacao_id)
    mp.publicacao_id,
    mp.views, mp.likes, mp.comentarios, mp.compartilhamentos,
    p.plataforma, p.data_publicacao,
    cg.titulo_final, cg.engine_usada, cg.hashtags,
    cg.nicho, cg.duracao_clip AS duracao_segundos,
    CASE WHEN mp.views > 0
      THEN ROUND(((mp.likes + mp.comentarios)::numeric / mp.views) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0
    END AS engagement_rate
  FROM metricas_publicacao mp
  JOIN publicacoes p ON p.id = mp.publicacao_id
  JOIN clips_gerados cg ON cg.id = p.clip_id
  WHERE mp.data_coleta >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ORDER BY mp.publicacao_id, mp.data_coleta DESC
)
SELECT * FROM (
  (SELECT 'top'  AS categoria, * FROM latest_metrics ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT 10)
  UNION ALL
  (SELECT 'flop' AS categoria, * FROM latest_metrics ORDER BY views ASC  LIMIT 10)
) combined
ORDER BY categoria, views DESC;

INSERT INTO insights_semanais (
  semana_ref, resumo_geral, nichos_promissores,
  recomendacoes, score_semana, insights_completo, report_raw, created_at
) VALUES (
  DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()),
  '{{ $json.resumo_geral }}',
  '{{ $json.nichos_promissores }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.recomendacoes }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.score_semana }},
  '{{ $json.insights_json }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.report_raw }}',
  NOW()
) ON CONFLICT (semana_ref) DO UPDATE SET
  resumo_geral       = EXCLUDED.resumo_geral,
  nichos_promissores = EXCLUDED.nichos_promissores,
  recomendacoes      = EXCLUDED.recomendacoes,
  score_semana       = EXCLUDED.score_semana,
  insights_completo  = EXCLUDED.insights_completo,
  report_raw         = EXCLUDED.report_raw;

SELECT
  p.id AS publicacao_id,
  p.clip_id,
  p.plataforma,
  p.id_publicacao_plataforma,
  p.url_publicacao,
  p.data_publicacao,
  cg.titulo_final,

  cg.duracao_clip AS duracao_segundos
FROM publicacoes p
JOIN clips_gerados cg ON cg.id = p.clip_id
WHERE p.status = 'publicado'
  AND p.data_publicacao >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND p.plataforma = 'youtube'
  AND p.id_publicacao_plataforma IS NOT NULL
  AND p.id_publicacao_plataforma NOT LIKE 'vizard-%'
  AND p.id_publicacao_plataforma != 'pending'
ORDER BY p.data_publicacao DESC
LIMIT 50;
